title: Golden Globes 2026 Awards Winner Predictions & Complete Winners List
text: At the 2026 Golden Globe Awards, Hamnet won Best Motion Picture — Drama. The film, directed by Chloé Zhao, competed against five other nominees including Frankenstein, It Was Just an Accident, The Secret Agent, Sentimental Value, and Sinners. Hamnet earned six total nominations at the ceremony, making it one of the evening's major contenders alongside other heavily nominated films.
